property.name: content
property.value: main.logger=FA impala.root.logger=INFO,FA log4j.rootLogger=${impala.root.logger} max.log.file.size=200MB log4j.appender.FA=org.apache.log4j.FileAppender log4j.appender.FA.layout=org.apache.log4j.PatternLayout log4j.appender.FA.File=${impala.log.dir}/impalad.INFO log4j.appender.FA.layout.ConversionPattern=%d{yy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss} %p %c{2}: %m%n log4j.appender.console=org.apache.log4j.ConsoleAppender log4j.appender.console.target=System.err log4j.appender.console.layout=org.apache.log4j.PatternLayout log4j.appender.console.layout.ConversionPattern=%d{yy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss} %p %c{2}: %m%n
